auth.createSub: No cost and no payment step. Explore EB-3 jobs in minutes.
auth.loginSub: Sign in to follow your process.
auth.terms: By creating an account, you agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.asideTitle: Your path to the American Green Card starts here.
auth.asideText: Kick Start connects professionals to jobs in the U.S. with EB-3 visa sponsorship — and follows every step of your process, from start to approval.
auth.point3: Dedicated team from start to finish

welcome.title: Account created{name}! 🎉
welcome.lead: Your free access is ready. Here's how your journey with Kick Start works, all the way to the Green Card.
welcome.step1Text: See positions with visa sponsorship and apply to the ones that fit you.
welcome.step2Text: Go through screening and interview. We connect you to the right employer.
welcome.step3Text: Follow each visa phase in real time in the "My EB-3 Process" portal.

jobs.title: Jobs with EB-3 sponsorship
jobs.subtitle: Verified positions, exclusive to the Green Card through work program.
jobs.introText: All positions below offer permanent visa sponsorship. Regular jobs are in a separate area.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search by role, company or city…
jobs.emptyText: Try adjusting your search or filters. New EB-3 jobs are added every week.

jobDetail.sponsorshipText: This position offers Green Card sponsorship through the EB-3 category. Kick Start follows every legal step — DOL/PERM, I-140 and I-485/Consular — alongside you.

g1.capsNote: Please write all contents in CAPITALS. Dates in MM/DD/YYYY format.
g1.marriageNote: The U.S. requires a legal civil marriage for immigration processes.
g1.sec_countries: Countries Lived In (other than birth country)
g1.everInUs: Have you ever been / are you currently in the U.S.?
g1.name: Name
g1.violatedTerms: Have you ever violated your visa terms?
g1.arrested: Have you ever been arrested anywhere?
g1.stayedOver6m: Have you/family ever stayed in the U.S. over 6 months?
g1.childrenMedicare: Have your children ever received Medicare in the U.S.?
g1.livedAbroad: Lived in another country >1 consecutive year after age 18?
g1.policeNote: A Police Clearance Letter will be required for each country listed.
g1.declAgree: I have read and agree with the Declaration above.
g1.consentCheckbox: I am aware of and agree with the details and values of the job
g1.errAgree: You must accept the Declaration to submit.
g1.errConsent: You must check the consent to submit the application.
g1.successText: We received your G1 form for {job} ({employer}). The Kick Start team will review it and get in touch. Track it in "My EB-3 Process".

consent.notice: The application may only be filled out and submitted by people who are already aware of the job details and values. Applications without intention to continue the process may result in restriction for future jobs.

portal.emptyTitle: Your process hasn't been opened yet
portal.emptyText: Once you're selected for an EB-3 job, the team will open your case and you'll be able to follow each phase here.
portal.notesPlaceholder: Write a clear update for the client about this phase…
portal.noNotes: No team notes for this phase yet. You'll be notified when there are updates.

admin.casesSubtitle: Track and update each client's progress.
admin.searchCases: Search by name, case # or country…
admin.noCasesFoundText: Adjust the search or status filters to see more results.
admin.noCasesYetText: Applications received are under "Applications". Open a case from an application to start tracking the client's process.
admin.editBanner: Edit mode — status and notes changes are visible to the client.
admin.noApplicationsText: When the client applies to a job, the answers appear here.
admin.newCaseSubtitle: Link a client to start tracking their EB-3 process.
admin.noClientsText: All clients already have an open case, or there are no clients registered yet.
admin.candidaturasSubtitle: Answers submitted by clients in the "Apply here" flow.
admin.noCandidaturasText: When a client applies to a job, the answers appear here.
admin.jobsSubtitle: Create and edit the jobs for each position.
admin.noJobsText: Create the first EB-3 job so clients can apply.
admin.newJobSubtitle: Fill in the details and define the job.

jobForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the position, the employer and the EB-3 sponsorship…
jobForm.g1Note: This job's application uses the G1 Form (full intake), the same for all EB-3 jobs. There is no per-job questionnaire anymore.
jobForm.removeConfirm: Remove this job? Applications linked to it will also be removed.

otherJobs.title: Other jobs
otherJobs.subtitle: Jobs from kick-start.us (membership required). Click to view and apply on the site.
otherJobs.errorTitle: Couldn't load jobs from the site right now
otherJobs.errorText: Try again shortly or see all jobs directly on kick-start.us.
